reviews.review_description: Has multiple liminal maps, pretty fun storylinhe, and I'm friends with the owner and he gave me infinite soaps

reviews.review_title: Best liminal space game you can find
reviews.review_description: Almost every liminal space vr game I've played has been super buggy, unscary and bad graphics. But this one is not that buggy compared to other liminal space vr games. There may be some bugs but the levels and the monsters and just the gameplay in general makes up for it. The main bugs in the game make you fall through the floor some times whenever you go to another level and another one is if you wear a shirt in the game it will ruin the movement in the game. But asides that everything in the game is perfect
For me it’s really good one because my friend owns it and second it’s a good liminal space game that’s free

reviews.review_title: extremely well made game, Blew my mind🥹
reviews.review_description: Probably the best liminial space VR game I’ve ever played 😸✌️
